zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Montagu於大約1332年出生在英國薩默塞特多亞特時，她的父親William Montagu32歲，母親Catherine Grandison17歲。她於1349年7月之前與Sir Edmund Arundel結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1354年1月30日在她的家鄉享年23歲。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Montagu was born about 1332, in Donyatt, Somerset, England, her father, William Montagu, was 32 and her mother, Catherine Grandison, was 17. She married Sir Edmund Arundel before July 1349. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 30 January 1354, in her hometown, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil Montagu est née environ 1332, à Donyatt, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Montagu, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Catherine Grandison, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Arundel avant juillet 1349. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1354, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 23 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Montagu(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 서머세트 도니엇에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Montagu(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Grandison(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1349년 7월 이전 Sir Edmund Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 1월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Montagu родилась около 1332 г. в местности донятт, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Montagu было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Grandison, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Arundel перед июля 1349 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 января 1354 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 23 лет.
